title: inula schmalhausenii
intro: Inula schmalhausenii, also known as Schmalhausen's elecampane or Asian elecampane, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing respiratory issues, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive problems. Inula schmalhausenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes, and is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
